overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game showing a character exploring a stormy, abandoned waterfront amusement park at night. The character ascends from a lower boardwalk to an upper promenade, passes a large yellow snake statue, observes the turbulent ocean and distant Ferris wheel, then enters a dark, flooded interior building.

scene_state.functional_zone: stormy waterfront boardwalk with ship wreck

events.description: character begins ascending wooden stairs to upper boardwalk level

agents.ego_description: walking forward on the boardwalk and climbing the stairs while carrying a rifle and backpack

entered.detail: large beached ship with visible hull markings partially obscured by storm
weathered wooden staircase with metal railings leading to upper level
black metal safety railings along the boardwalk edge
tattered fabric awning providing partial cover from rain

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a storm-swept waterfront boardwalk toward a wooden staircase. A large ship wreck is visible in the background through the heavy rain and fog. The character begins ascending the stairs to reach the upper promenade level.

scene_state.functional_zone: amusement park upper deck with statues and benches

events.description: reaches top of stairs and enters upper promenade area with amusement park elements

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the upper boardwalk past amusement park structures and benches

entered.detail: large yellow and blue serpent amusement ride statue with cartoonish features
massive rusted Ferris wheel structure silhouetted against stormy sky
wooden slatted benches lined along the boardwalk railing

segments.scene_description: Having ascended the stairs, the character walks along the upper promenade past a distinctive yellow snake statue and empty park benches. The massive Ferris wheel becomes visible in the distance through the storm, while the ship wreck disappears behind the building structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront observation deck with stormy ocean view

events.description: character stops at railing to observe the turbulent ocean and storm
character resumes walking along the waterfront railing

agents.ego_description: pausing at the railing to look out at the stormy water and Ferris wheel, then continuing along the waterfront path

entered.detail: churning dark ocean waves crashing against the pier supports in heavy storm
wooden pier supports and framework extending into the water with clock tower

segments.scene_description: The character stops at the boardwalk railing to observe the violent storm crashing against the pier supports. The Ferris wheel looms in the distance to the right. After a moment of observation, the character continues walking along the waterfront, with the churning ocean visible beyond the railing.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded derelict interior with debris and broken windows

events.description: character enters dark flooded building from the boardwalk
moving deeper into interior where flashlight becomes primary light source

agents.ego_description: cautiously entering the flooded building and moving through dark derelict rooms with flashlight illuminating the way

entered.detail: shallow water covering the concrete floor reflecting the flashlight beam
scattered rubble and abandoned objects accumulated in corners
abandoned hospital or medical equipment cart with supplies
closed metal door with small window panel at end of corridor
framed informational poster or sign on the concrete wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dark, flooded interior space from the boardwalk, transitioning from the stormy exterior to a derelict building with water-covered floors. Using a flashlight to navigate, the character moves through debris-filled rooms past broken windows and abandoned medical equipment, approaching a metal door at the corridor's end.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a storm-lashed outdoor boardwalk into the claustrophobic, flooded interior of a derelict building. It begins with the character walking through heavy rain and fog toward a wooden staircase, with a shipwreck looming in the background before they ascend to an upper promenade. As the character moves along this elevated path, they pass a yellow snake statue and empty benches while the shipwreck vanishes behind structures and a massive Ferris wheel emerges through the storm. The scene then pauses at a railing to observe the violent ocean crashing against the pier supports before the character continues forward and steps inside a dark, water-covered room. Finally, the environment shifts from the open gale to a silent, debris-filled interior where a flashlight illuminates broken windows and abandoned medical equipment leading toward a distant metal door.
